entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: The crop species for which the simulation model was developed and evaluated.

entities.name: CROPGRO-SOYBEAN
entities.description: A crop simulation model used to predict growth parameters and evaluate agricultural risks.

entities.name: VERTIC INCEPTISOL
entities.description: A specific soil type used for the evaluation of the CROPGRO-Soybean model.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICAL CONDITION
entities.description: The climatic environment where the model evaluation took place.

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A growth parameter predicted by the CROPGRO-Soybean model.

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: A growth parameter predicted by the CROPGRO-Soybean model.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The final productivity measure predicted by the model and influenced by ET and soil depth.

entities.name: EVAPOTRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The combined process of evaporation and transpiration, linearly related to grain yield.

entities.name: SOIL WATER-STORAGE CAPACITY
entities.description: A soil property assessed for its influence on grain yield.

entities.name: SOIL DEPTH
entities.description: A physical soil attribute that affects yield non-linearly, with a critical threshold of 37 cm.

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The overall output of the crop, which is unsustainable below a specific soil depth threshold.

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technologies aimed at preventing the degradation of Vertic Inceptisols.
